positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    donated(harding)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    located_in(harding,picuris)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~mountain_range_in(picuris,texas)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg
% SZS output start Proof for neg
2. mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) | mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [input(axiom)]
4. located_in(harding,picuris) & donated(harding) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (mountain_range_in(X0,texas) => ! [X1] : (located_in(X1,X0) => ~donated(X1))) [input(axiom)]
6. mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) [flattening 7]
10. ! [X0] : (! [X1] : (~donated(X1) | ~located_in(X1,X0)) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas)) [ennf transformation 5]
12. mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) | mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [cnf transformation 2]
13. donated(harding) [cnf transformation 4]
14. located_in(harding,picuris) [cnf transformation 4]
15. ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1) | ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas) [cnf transformation 10]
16. ~mountain_range_in(picuris,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 8]
17. mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [forward subsumption resolution 12,16]
18. ~donated(harding) | ~mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [resolution 15,14]
19. ~mountain_range_in(picuris,texas) [forward subsumption resolution 18,13]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 19,17]
% SZS output end Proof for neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
